title: Tab Tweaks
description: Improvements and customization for Minecraft's Tab / Player List HUD
body: # Tab Tweaks Improvements and customization for Minecraft's Tab / Player List HUD ## Features ### Visual - Max Players - Remove Header - Remove Footer - Remove Heads - Remove NPC Heads Only - Improved Head Hats - Remove Objectives - Remove Ping - Show Numerical Ping - Scale Numerical Ping - Hide Fake Ping ### Position - Tab Scale - Move Tab List Down - Move Tab List Horizontally - Move Tab List Below Bossbars ### Tab Color - Header Color - Body Color - Footer Color - Player Widget Color ### Ping Color - Ping Between 0 and 75 - Ping Between 75 and 145 - Ping Between 145 and 200 - Ping Between 200 and 300 - Ping Between 300 and 400 - Ping Above 400
